callGraph.callee:
admin
    .from('print_agent_devices')
    .update({
      routing_snapshot: snapshot,
      mapped_station_count: snapshot.receipt_printers.length,
    })
    .eq('id', params.deviceId)
    .eq

admin
    .from('print_agent_devices')
    .select('routing_snapshot, paired_at')
    .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantId)
    .is('revoked_at', null)
    .order('paired_at', { ascending: false })
    .limit

admin
    .from('print_stations')
    .select('id, name_pt, name_en, name_zh, sort_order')
    .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantId)
    .order

new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-CA', {
    timeZone,
    year: 'numeric',
    month: '2-digit',
    day: '2-digit',
    hour: '2-digit',
    minute: '2-digit',
    hour12: false,
    hourCycle: 'h23',
  }).formatToParts
